meta.title: Mafali Bros Painting Service LLC | Professional Painters in Chicago IL
meta.description: Transform your home with the best painters in Chicago, IL. High-quality residential and commercial painting. Request your free estimate today!
meta.keywords: chicago painting service, painters in chicago, residential painting chicago, commercial painting, mafali bros painting, professional painters

hero.title: Same House. New Wow.
hero.subtitle: Transforming your living space can be a thrilling journey that breathes new life into your home while reflecting your evolving style and needs.

about.title: Professional Painters with Passion for Detail
about.description_1: At Mafali Bros Painting Service LLC, we pride ourselves on delivering the highest quality residential and commercial painting services in Chicago, IL. As a family-owned business, we understand that your home or business is your biggest investment. That's why we treat every project with maximum care, meticulous preparation, and flawless finishes.
about.description_2: Our dedication to the customer is built on honesty, punctuality, and service excellence. From surface preparation to the final stroke of color, we ensure your space gets that 'Wow' effect you've always desired.
about.mision_desc: To provide exceptional, personalized painting services that beautify and protect our clients' properties, ensuring long-lasting finishes and a stress-free experience through excellence and professionalism.
about.vision_desc: To be recognized as the leading residential and commercial painting company in Chicago and its surroundings, distinguished by our integrity, superior craftsmanship, and the transformative impact of our work.

services.title: Our Specialized Services
services.subtitle: We offer complete interior and exterior painting solutions, using top-quality materials to ensure long-lasting results.

items.title: Interior Painting
items.description: We transform living rooms, kitchens, bedrooms, and offices. Includes drywall repair, wallpaper removal, patching, and low-odor premium paint application.

items.title: Exterior Painting
items.description: We protect and beautify your home's facade. We perform pressure washing, old paint scraping, crack caulking, and paint application resistant to the harshest weather.

items.title: Surface Preparation
items.description: The secret to a durable paint job lies in preparation. We sand, patch imperfections, apply high-adhesion primers, and guarantee a perfect base before painting.

items.title: Commercial Painting
items.description: We improve the appearance of your business or office. We work with flexible schedules to minimize disruption to your commercial activities, with fast and professional finishes.

contact.title: Ready to Transform Your Space?
contact.subtitle: Get in touch with Oscar, our specialist, to schedule a free estimate or resolve any questions.
contact.form_message_placeholder: Describe what you need painted, approximate dimensions, or specific details...
contact.form_success: Message sent successfully! Oscar will get in touch with you very soon.
contact.form_error: There was an error sending the form. Please try again or call us directly.

footer.about_desc: Professional residential and commercial painting services in Chicago and nearby suburbs. Quality, warranty, and premium finishes.
footer.copyright: © {year} Mafali Bros Painting Service LLC. All rights reserved. Designed for optimal performance.

whatsapp_chatbot.welcome_msg: Hi! Welcome to Mafali Bros. I am Oscar's virtual assistant. How can I help you today?

options.opt_estimate: How do I request a free estimate?
options.opt_services: What kind of painting do you offer?

responses.resp_estimate: It's very easy! You can fill out the contact form on this page or we can schedule it right now on WhatsApp. Shall we go to WhatsApp to coordinate your estimate?
responses.resp_hours: We offer phone support and services Monday through Saturday, from 8:00 AM to 6:00 PM. Would you like to send a direct WhatsApp to Oscar to confirm a date?
responses.resp_services: We specialize in residential painting (interior & exterior), deep surface preparation, and commercial painting in Chicago. Want to coordinate details with Oscar on WhatsApp?
responses.resp_direct: Perfect! We will redirect you to Oscar's direct WhatsApp chat in a moment. Press the button below to start chatting.

wp_messages.msg_estimate: Hello Oscar! I would like to request a free estimate for my painting project.
wp_messages.msg_hours: Hello Oscar! I would like to check your available hours to schedule a painting job.
wp_messages.msg_services: Hello Oscar! I would like to receive information about your residential and commercial painting services.
wp_messages.msg_direct: Hello Oscar! I would like to speak with you directly about a painting project.
